_comment: TASK-053 / ADR-006 §5.4 — committed M3 baseline for the near-Sol tier-unification budget gate. Recorded by running the SAME probe in baseline mode (?debug=flythrough4&baseline=m3) against the M3 tier (HYG-only octree + ALWAYS-ON HYG monolith + procgen) on the identical committed flythrough3 path. The M4a run (combined HYG+Gaia octree, monolith culled once the octree covers the cut, coverage-faded procgen) must come in AT OR BELOW these near-Sol TOTAL-SCENE numbers — proving fewer redundant layers (ADR-006 §5.4 rule 4).
_metric: nearSol is TOTAL scene work (gl.info.render: calls + points), NOT the streaming-only stats. The redundant layer the unification removes is the HYG monolith, which StarScene draws OUTSIDE the streaming policy; the streaming-only renderedPoints/drawCalls cannot see it (M4a would even read slightly HIGHER, by the 135-star Gaia sample the combined octree adds). gl.info.render captures the whole composition, so M3 (monolith on) reads above M4a (monolith culled near Sol).
_howToRecord: Rebuild web (pnpm --filter @cosmos/web build), then run the probe in baseline mode against the preview build with SwiftShader and read window.__flythrough4Result. Copy max(segments.toSol, segments.toEarth) of peakSceneDrawCalls and peakScenePoints into nearSol below and set _recorded=true. NOTE: scene draw/point counts are GL-backend-independent (they are three.js JS counters), so a real-GPU browser records the same numbers as SwiftShader — only frame timing differs by backend.
_recordedNote: Re-recorded 2026-06-24 on chromium via ?debug=flythrough4&baseline=m3 with BUG-6 fixed and the gl.info.render scene metric. M3 toSol: sceneDraws=40, scenePts=109,971 (the always-on HYG monolith dominates scenePts). M4a toSol for comparison: sceneDraws=39, scenePts=572 — the monolith is culled once the octree covers the cut, a clean drop on both metrics. The prior baseline (1000000 pts / 1 draw, 2026-06-22) was degenerate (BUG-6 present + streaming-only metric blind to the monolith) and is retired.

nearSol._comment: the toSol (galaxy-context) approach segment — where the monolith coverage-gate fires. TOTAL scene work (gl.info.render). NOT max(toSol,toEarth): toEarth is system context and redraws the monolith in both tiers, washing the win out.

caps._comment: Inherited §5.8 hard caps — these gate the streaming budget regardless of the relative comparison and never relax (TASK-053 forbidden actions).
